holdings.infoBox: FDEM is an equity ETF with a total of 242 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.04%, Samsung Electronics at 8.22%, SK hynix at 5.61%, Tencent Holdings at 2.83%, and Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund at 1.72%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Emerging Markets Multifactor ETF (FDEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multi-factored index of emerging markets companies. FDEM was launched on Feb 26, 2019 and is issued by Fidelity.
